name: autogen-api-style-agent
description: Full MCP connectivity layer for the autonomous agent factory — 8 servers across core, deployment, and knowledge tiers.

tiers.core: Install immediately — required for baseline agent operation.
tiers.deployment: Install after core — enables CI/CD and hosted service control.
tiers.knowledge: Install last — adds persistent memory and external knowledge sources.

github.description: GitHub repo management: issues, PRs, checks, releases, branches, commits.

playwright.description: Browser automation and UI verification via Microsoft Playwright — navigate, click, type, screenshot, evaluate JS.

filesystem.description: Workspace file I/O — read, write, list, move, search within the project root.

vercel.description: Vercel deployments — trigger builds, read preview URLs, manage env vars, monitor deploy status.

railway.description: Railway services — deploy hooks, log streaming, env vars, service lifecycle, database provisioning.

notion.description: Notion workspace — internal runbooks, specs, and project documentation.

fetch.description: HTTP fetching — API endpoints, webhook testing, health checks, page content extraction.

memory.description: Persistent knowledge graph — agent context, decisions, and outputs across sessions.
